resources.string: Wake listening is on only because you started it in Neo; Android requires this notification when the mic may be active.
Microphone is used only when you use voice chat, wake word, or speech in the app — not for background recording.
A short foreground notification appears while wake listening is on, as required by Android when the microphone may be active.
Notifications show when wake listening is running so you always know the mic-related feature is on.
Optional: if you turn on notification access in system settings, Neo can read notification text for features you enable (e.g. message previews). You can revoke this anytime in Android settings.
Used only so voice commands can adjust media ringtone volume through the same controls as your volume keys.
